name: Time
description: Date and time arithmetic across timezones — current time, parsing, formatting, conversions, durations, diffs.

tools.name: current_time
tools.description: Get the current date and time, optionally in a specific IANA timezone.

tools.name: format_date
tools.description: Format a Unix timestamp or date string into a chosen format.

tools.name: parse_date
tools.description: Parse a date string into a Unix timestamp + ISO 8601 in the given timezone. Use this before any date arithmetic.

tools.name: convert_timezone
tools.description: Re-express an instant in a different timezone. Returns the same wall instant projected into the target zone.

tools.name: add_duration
tools.description: Add (or subtract) a duration from a date. Pass either an ISO 8601 duration like 'P1DT2H' or a raw 'seconds' value.

tools.name: diff_dates
tools.description: Compute the difference between two dates. Returns total seconds, an ISO 8601 duration, and a human summary.

tools.name: list_timezones
tools.description: List all known IANA timezone identifiers, optionally filtered by prefix. Use this to validate user-supplied zones.

skills.name: osaurus-time
skills.description: Teaches the agent how to use the time tools — current time, timezone conversion, parsing dates, formatting, date arithmetic.
